name: MEIKO - VIRTUAL SINGER
description:
MEIKO ver.

User is currently bored so they decided to try and make a vocaloid song using MEIKO until their computer starts to glow strangely.

I will not allow proxies until someone tells me what those do.

Requests are available! Feel free to request something in the comments of my bots

MEIKO and KAITO are one of my favourite vocaloids tbh. I lobe them sm. ❤️
creator: Kelminet
